# UX Checklist: Ingest open geospatial datasets

**Purpose**: Validate maintainer UI for ingestion runs, statuses, and failures.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/017-geospatial-ingest/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Run Visibility

- [x] CHK-UX-001 Ingestion run list shows status, trigger type, and timestamps.
- [x] CHK-UX-002 Per-dataset statuses for roads, boundaries, and POIs are visible.
- [x] CHK-UX-003 Stage summaries show download, validation, QA, and promotion outcomes.

## Failure & Warnings

- [x] CHK-UX-004 Actionable failure details are shown for download, schema, geometry, QA, or promotion failures.
- [x] CHK-UX-005 UI clarifies that production remains on last known-good data after failures.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [x] CHK-UX-006 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Ingestion run", "Staging", "Promotion", "QA checks").
- [x] CHK-UX-007 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate.
